Author: Andrew Lee Rubinger <alr@alrubinger.com>

    feat(api): add spec-first OpenAPI codegen, Scalar docs, and spec validation (#7)

      core/api/openapi.yaml (spec-first approach)
    - Implement generated ServerInterface in server with 501 stubs for

    - Add docs Docker image build to CI and docker-compose

Perfect! Now I have all the pieces. Let me create a comprehensive summary document:

## Analysis Summary: CI "Verify Generated Code" Step Failure Since Commit 40f5871

Based on my thorough investigation, here's what I found:

### 1. The CI Workflow (`.github/workflows/ci.yml`)

The "Verify Generated Code" job (lines 14-33) does the following:
- Checks out the code
- Sets up Go 1.24
- **Runs code generation**: `go run github.com/oapi-codegen/oapi-codegen/v2/cmd/oapi-codegen --config api/oapi-codegen.yaml api/openapi.yaml`
- **Verifies no diff**: `git diff --exit-code core/api/gen/`

This means the CI generates code fresh from the OpenAPI spec and expects it to match what's in the repository. If there's a diff, the job fails.

### 2. Commit 40f5871 Changes

The commit "fix(api): set Scalar docs server URL to app.withaileron.ai" modified:
- **File changed**: `core/api/openapi.yaml` (4 insertions/deletions)
- **Changes made**:
  - Removed two placeholder server entries:
    - `https://api.agentic-control-plane.example.com` (Production)
    - `https://sandbox.agentic-control-plane.example.com` (Sandbox)
  - Added one real production server:
    - `https://app.withaileron.ai` (Production)

- **Generated files**: The commit ONLY modified the OpenAPI spec file, NOT the generated `core/api/gen/server.gen.go` file

### 3. The Root Cause of the CI Failure

When commit 40f5871 was created:
- The OpenAPI spec was updated with the real server URL
- The generated code file was **NOT regenerated**
- The generated code still contains the embedded gzip-compressed OpenAPI spec from BEFORE the server URL change

**When the CI runs**:
- It freshly regenerates the code from the current `core/api/openapi.yaml`
- The newly generated `server.gen.go` will have the UPDATED server URL embedded in its swaggerSpec variable
- This differs from the committed `server.gen.go` which still has the OLD embedded spec
- `git diff --exit-code core/api/gen/` detects this mismatch and exits with code 1 (failure)

### 4. The OpenAPI Codegen Setup

**Configuration** (`core/api/oapi-codegen.yaml`):
```yaml
package: api
output: api/gen/server.gen.go
generate:
  - std-http-server
  - types
  - spec
```

The `spec` generation option causes oapi-codegen to embed the entire OpenAPI specification as a gzip-compressed, base64-encoded string in the generated code (the `swaggerSpec` variable in `server.gen.go`).

This embedding means:
- Any change to `openapi.yaml` automatically changes what should be generated
- The generated file must be regenerated and committed whenever the spec changes

### 5. Key Files Involved

| Path | Purpose |

Perfect! Now I have all the pieces. Let me create a comprehensive summary document:

## Analysis Summary: CI "Verify Generated Code" Step Failure Since Commit 40f5871

Based on my thorough investigation, here's what I found:

### 1. The CI Workflow (`.github/workflows/ci.yml`)

The "Verify Generated Code" job (lines 14-33) does the following:
- Checks out the code
- Sets up Go 1.24
- **Runs code generation**: `go run github.com/oapi-codegen/oapi-codegen/v2/cmd/oapi-codegen --config api/oapi-codegen.yaml api/openapi.yaml`
- **Verifies no diff**: `git diff --exit-code core/api/gen/`

This means the CI generates code fresh from the OpenAPI spec and expects it to match what's in the repository. If there's a diff, the job fails.

### 2. Commit 40f5871 Changes

The commit "fix(api): set Scalar docs server URL to app.withaileron.ai" modified:
- **File changed**: `core/api/openapi.yaml` (4 insertions/deletions)
- **Changes made**:
  - Removed two placeholder server entries:
    - `https://api.agentic-control-plane.example.com` (Production)
    - `https://sandbox.agentic-control-plane.example.com` (Sandbox)
  - Added one real production server:
    - `https://app.withaileron.ai` (Production)

- **Generated files**: The commit ONLY modified the OpenAPI spec file, NOT the generated `core/api/gen/server.gen.go` file

### 3. The Root Cause of the CI Failure

When commit 40f5871 was created:
- The OpenAPI spec was updated with the real server URL
- The generated code file was **NOT regenerated**
- The generated code still contains the embedded gzip-compressed OpenAPI spec from BEFORE the server URL change

**When the CI runs**:
- It freshly regenerates the code from the current `core/api/openapi.yaml`
- The newly generated `server.gen.go` will have the UPDATED server URL embedded in its swaggerSpec variable
- This differs from the committed `server.gen.go` which still has the OLD embedded spec
- `git diff --exit-code core/api/gen/` detects this mismatch and exits with code 1 (failure)

### 4. The OpenAPI Codegen Setup

**Configuration** (`core/api/oapi-codegen.yaml`):
```yaml
package: api
output: api/gen/server.gen.go
generate:
  - std-http-server
  - types
  - spec
```

The `spec` generation option causes oapi-codegen to embed the entire OpenAPI specification as a gzip-compressed, base64-encoded string in the generated code (the `swaggerSpec` variable in `server.gen.go`).

This embedding means:
- Any change to `openapi.yaml` automatically changes what should be generated
- The generated file must be regenerated and committed whenever the spec changes

### 5. Key Files Involved

| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `/Users/alr/git/ALRubinger/aileron/.github/workflows/ci.yml` | CI pipeline with the "Verify Generated Code" job |
| `/Users/alr/git/ALRubinger/aileron/core/api/openapi.yaml` | The OpenAPI specification (modified in 40f5871) |
| `/Users/alr/git/ALRubinger/aileron/core/api/oapi-codegen.yaml` | Codegen configuration that includes `spec` generation |
| `/Users/alr/git/ALRubinger/aileron/core/api/gen/server.gen.go` | Generated code (NOT updated in 40f5871, causing CI failure) |

### 6. Why the CI Breaks

The CI workflow:
1. Checks out the current repository state (with old embedded spec in `server.gen.go`)
2. Runs codegen which generates new code with the updated spec
3. Runs `git diff --exit-code core/api/gen/` which finds differences
4. Exits with non-zero status, failing the job

This is actually correct behavior - it's detecting that the committed generated code is out of sync with the source spec!

file.content:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

concurrency:
  group: ci-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  generate:
    name: Verify Generated Code
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v5

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v6
        with:
          go-version: "1.24"
          cache-dependency-path: |
            core/go.mod
            sdk/go/go.mod
            test/integration/go.mod

      - name: Run code generation
        working-directory: core
        run: go run github.com/oapi-codegen/oapi-codegen/v2/cmd/oapi-codegen --config api/oapi-codegen.yaml api/openapi.yaml

      - name: Verify no diff
        run: git diff --exit-code core/api/gen/

  lint:
    name: Lint
    needs: generate
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v5

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v6
        with:
          go-version: "1.24"
          cache-dependency-path: |
            core/go.mod
            sdk/go/go.mod
            test/integration/go.mod

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v5
        with:
          version: latest

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v6
        with:
          node-version: "24"
          cache: pnpm
          cache-dependency-path: ui/pnpm-lock.yaml

      - name: Install UI dependencies
        working-directory: ui
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Go vet
        run: go vet ./core/... ./sdk/go/...

      - name: Svelte check
        working-directory: ui
        run: pnpm check

  test:
    name: Unit Tests
    needs: lint
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v5

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v6
        with:
          go-version: "1.24"
          cache-dependency-path: |
            core/go.mod
            sdk/go/go.mod
            test/integration/go.mod

      - name: Run Go tests
        run: go test -race -coverprofile=coverage.out ./core/... ./sdk/go/...

      - name: Upload coverage
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
        with:
          name: coverage
          path: coverage.out

  build:
    name: Build Docker Images
    needs: test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v5

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v4

      - name: Build server image
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v7
        with:
          context: .
          file: core/server/Dockerfile
          push: false
          load: true
          tags: aileron-server:${{ github.sha }}
          cache-from: type=gha,scope=server
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max,scope=server

      - name: Build UI image
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v7
        with:
          context: ./ui
          file: ui/Dockerfile
          push: false
          load: true
          tags: aileron-ui:${{ github.sha }}
          cache-from: type=gha,scope=ui
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max,scope=ui

      - name: Build docs image
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v7
        with:
          context: .
          file: docs/Dockerfile
          push: false
          load: true
          tags: aileron-docs:${{ github.sha }}
          cache-from: type=gha,scope=docs
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max,scope=docs

  integration:
    name: Integration Tests
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v5

      - name: Start full stack
        run: docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.yml up -d --build --wait
        timeout-minutes: 5

      - name: Wait for healthy server
        run: |
          for i in $(seq 1 30); do
            if curl -sf http://localhost:8080/v1/health; then
              echo ""
              echo "Server healthy"
              exit 0
            fi
            sleep 2
          done
          echo "Server did not become healthy"
          docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.yml logs
          exit 1

      - name: Wait for healthy UI
        run: |
          for i in $(seq 1 20); do
            if curl -sf http://localhost:3000; then
              echo "UI healthy"
              exit 0
            fi
            sleep 2
          done
          echo "UI did not become healthy"
          exit 1

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v6
        with:
          go-version: "1.24"
          cache-dependency-path: |
            core/go.mod
            sdk/go/go.mod
            test/integration/go.mod

      - name: Run integration tests
        run: go test -tags=integration -race ./test/integration/...
        env:
          AILERON_API_URL: http://localhost:8080
          AILERON_UI_URL: http://localhost:3000

      - name: Dump logs on failure
        if: failure()
        run: docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.yml logs

      - name: Tear down
        if: always()
        run: docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.yml down -v

# Fix: Set Scalar docs server URL and regenerate code

## Context

Commit `40f5871` ("fix(api): set Scalar docs server URL to app.withaileron.ai") changed the server URLs in `core/api/openapi.yaml` but did **not** regenerate `core/api/gen/server.gen.go`. Because oapi-codegen embeds the full OpenAPI spec (gzip+base64) in the generated file (via the `spec` generation option), any spec change causes a diff. CI's "Verify Generated Code" step caught this mismatch and failed.

That commit (and the subsequent README commit) have been force-pushed off main. We now need to redo the fix properly in a branch.

## Steps

1. **Create a feature branch** from current `main` (`27f5550`)

2. **Update `core/api/openapi.yaml`** — replace placeholder server URLs:
   ```yaml
   servers:
     - url: https://app.withaileron.ai
       description: Production
   ```
   (Remove the sandbox entry, same as the original commit intended.)

3. **Regenerate the server code**:
   ```sh
   cd core && go run github.com/oapi-codegen/oapi-codegen/v2/cmd/oapi-codegen --config api/oapi-codegen.yaml api/openapi.yaml
   ```

4. **Verify no diff** (same check CI runs):
   ```sh
   git diff --exit-code core/api/gen/
   ```
   This should show no diff after step 3, confirming the generated code is in sync.

5. **Commit both files** (`openapi.yaml` + `server.gen.go`) in a single commit

6. **Push the branch** for PR

## Files modified

- `core/api/openapi.yaml` — server URL update
- `core/api/gen/server.gen.go` — regenerated (auto)

## Verification

- Run the same codegen command CI uses and confirm `git diff --exit-code core/api/gen/` passes
- Optionally run `go vet ./core/...` to confirm no build issues

        "400":

  /v1/connectors/{connector_id}:

      requestBody:

              $ref: "#/components/schemas/UpdateConnectorRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Connector updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Connector"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"
        "404":

  /v1/execution-grants/{grant_id}:

  /v1/executions/run:

                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExecutionRunResponse"

          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"
        "404":

  /v1/executions/{execution_id}:

            application/json:

                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Execution"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"
        "404":

  /v1/executions/{execution_id}/callback:

      tags: [Executions]

      operationId: executionCallback

              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExecutionCallbackRequest"

                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Execution"
        "400":

        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"

  /v1/funding-sources:

    post:
      tags: [Funding Sources]

      operationId: createFundingSource
      requestBody:

          application/json:

              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateFundingSourceRequest"

        "201":
          description: Funding source created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/FundingSource"
        "400":

  /v1/credentials:

                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CredentialListResponse"

    post:
      tags: [Credentials]
      summary: Register a credential reference
      operationId: createCredential
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateCredentialRequest"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Credential created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CredentialReference"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":

  /v1/traces:
    get:
      tags: [Traces]

        - name: workspace_id

      responses:
        "200":
          description: Traces
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/TraceListResponse"

  /v1/analytics/summary:

          schema:
            type: string
            format: date-time
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Analytics summary
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/AnalyticsSummary"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"

components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
      bearerFormat: JWT

  parameters:
    IntentId:
      name: intent_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ApprovalId:
      name: approval_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    PolicyId:
      name: policy_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ConnectorId:
      name: connector_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    GrantId:
      name: grant_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ExecutionId:
      name: execution_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    PageSize:
      name: page_size
      in: query
      schema:
        type: integer
        minimum: 1
        maximum: 200
        default: 50
    PageToken:
      name: page_token
      in: query
      schema:
        type: string

  responses:
    BadRequest:
      description: Invalid request
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    Unauthorized:
      description: Missing or invalid authentication
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    Forbidden:
      description: Insufficient permissions
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    NotFound:
      description: Resource not found
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    Conflict:
      description: Conflict with current resource state
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"

  schemas:
    HealthResponse:
      type: object
      required: [status, service, version, timestamp]
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [ok, degraded, down]
        service:
          type: string
        version:
          type: string
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Error:
      type: object
      required: [error]
      properties:
        error:
          type: object
          required: [code, message]
          properties:
            code: { type: string }
            message: { type: string }
            details:
              type: array
              items:
                type: object
                additionalProperties: true
            request_id: { type: string }

    Pagination:
      type: object
      properties:
        next_page_token:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    IntentStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [pending_policy, pending_approval, approved, denied, executing, succeeded, failed, cancelled, expired]

    ApprovalStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [pending, approved, denied, modified, delegated, expired, cancelled]

    PolicyStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [draft, active, archived]

    ConnectorType:
      type: string
      enum: [payments, source_control, cloud, deployment, email, calendar, ticketing, crm, erp, secret_manager, internal_api, custom]

    RiskLevel:
      type: string
      enum: [low, medium, high, critical]

    DecisionDisposition:
      type: string
      enum: [allow, allow_modified, require_approval, deny, require_more_evidence]

    ActorRef:
      type: object
      required: [id, type]
      properties:
        id: { type: string }
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [agent, human, service, connector_runtime]
        display_name: { type: string }

    ActionTarget:
      type: object
      required: [kind]
      properties:
        kind:
          type: string
          enum: [vendor, repository, environment, api, secret, calendar, email_recipient, ticket, cloud_resource, custom]
        id: { type: string }
        display_name: { type: string }

    Money:
      type: object
      required: [amount, currency]
      properties:
        amount:
          type: integer
          description: Amount in minor units
          minimum: 0
        currency:
          type: string
          minLength: 3
          maxLength: 3

    Recipient:
      type: object
      required: [email]
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email

    AttachmentRef:
      type: object
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        mime_type: { type: string }
        url: { type: string, format: uri }
        storage_ref: { type: string }

    CalendarAttendee:
      type: object
      required: [email]
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        optional:
          type: boolean
          default: false

    LineItem:
      type: object
      required: [description, quantity, unit_amount]
      properties:
        description:
          type: string
        quantity:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1
        unit_amount:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        sku:
          type: string

    GitAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [github, gitlab, bitbucket, custom]
        repository:
          type: string
        branch:
          type: string
        base_branch:
          type: string
        commit_shas:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        files_changed:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        pr_title:
          type: string
        pr_body:
          type: string
        labels:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        reviewers:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        checks_required:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string

    DeployAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [kubernetes, vercel, netlify, aws, gcp, azure, flyio, custom]
        service:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        artifact_ref:
          type: string
        image_ref:
          type: string
        cluster:
          type: string
        namespace:
          type: string
        strategy:
          type: string
          enum: [rolling, blue_green, canary, replace, custom]
        rollback_supported:
          type: boolean
        change_ticket_id:
          type: string
        maintenance_window_id:
          type: string

    CloudAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [aws, gcp, azure, cloudflare, custom]
        account_id:
          type: string
        region:
          type: string
        resource_type:
          type: string
        resource_id:
          type: string
        operation:
          type: string
        estimated_cost:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        tags:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: string

    EmailAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        from:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        to:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        cc:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        bcc:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        subject:
          type: string
        body_text:
          type: string
        body_html:
          type: string
        attachments:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/AttachmentRef"
        thread_ref:
          type: string
        send_mode:
          type: string
          enum: [send_now, draft_only]

    CalendarAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [google_calendar, outlook, custom]
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        attendees:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/CalendarAttendee"
        start_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        end_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        timezone:
          type: string
        location:
          type: string
        conference_type:
          type: string
          enum: [none, google_meet, zoom, teams, custom]
        calendar_id:
          type: string
        visibility:
          type: string
          enum: [default, public, private]

    PaymentBeneficiary:
      type: object
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        department: { type: string }

    PaymentAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        vendor_name:
          type: string
        vendor_id:
          type: string
        amount:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        merchant_category:
          type: string
        budget_code:
          type: string
        funding_source_id:
          type: string
        payment_instrument_preference:
          type: string
          enum: [virtual_card, ach, wallet, network_proxy, unspecified]
        beneficiary:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PaymentBeneficiary"
        line_items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/LineItem"
        renewal:
          type: boolean
        contract_term:
          type: string
        recurring_interval:
          type: string
          enum: [none, monthly, quarterly, annual]
        merchant_reference:
          type: string

    ProcurementAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        request_type:
          type: string
          enum: [software, travel, equipment, contractor, services, other]
        vendor_name:
          type: string
        amount_estimate:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        justification:
          type: string
        requestor:
          type: string
        cost_center:
          type: string
        legal_review_required:
          type: boolean
        security_review_required:
          type: boolean
        line_items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/LineItem"

    DomainAction:
      type: object
      description: |
        Carries action-type-specific fields. Exactly one field must be populated,
        corresponding to the prefix of ActionIntent.type:
          - git.* → git
          - deploy.* → deploy
          - cloud.* → cloud
          - email.* → email
          - calendar.* → calendar
          - payment.* → payment
          - procurement.* → procurement
        The server rejects requests where the populated domain field does not
        match the action type prefix.
      minProperties: 1
      maxProperties: 1
      properties:
        git:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/GitAction"
        deploy:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DeployAction"
        cloud:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/CloudAction"
        email:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/EmailAction"
        calendar:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/CalendarAction"
        payment:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PaymentAction"
        procurement:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProcurementAction"

    ActionIntent:
      type: object
      required: [type, summary]
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          examples:
            - git.pull_request.create
            - deploy.release
            - cloud.resource.mutate
            - email.send
            - calendar.event.create
            - payment.charge
            - procurement.request.submit
        summary:
          type: string
        justification:
          type: string
        target:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionTarget"
        domain:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DomainAction"
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    IntentContext:
      type: object
      properties:
        environment:
          type: string
          examples: [development, staging, production]
        source_platform:
          type: string
          examples: [openclaw, claude_code, codex, openhands, goose, cline, continue, langgraph, custom]
        source_session_id:
          type: string
        source_trace_id:
          type: string
        ip_address:
          type: string
        risk_hints:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        user_present:
          type: boolean
        temporary_grant_id:
          type: string

    CreateIntentRequest:
      type: object
      required: [idempotency_key, agent_id, workspace_id, action]
      properties:
        idempotency_key:
          type: string
        agent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        action:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionIntent"
        context:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentContext"
        callback_url:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: |
            Optional webhook URL. The control plane will POST status updates
            to this URL as the intent progresses through the lifecycle
            (policy evaluated, approval requested, approved/denied, execution
            started, execution completed). This avoids the need for agents
            to poll the GET /v1/intents/{id} endpoint.

    EvidenceItem:
      type: object
      required: [type, value]
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [text, link, diff_summary, screenshot_ref, receipt_ref, test_result, change_ticket, artifact_ref, custom]
        label:
          type: string
        value:
          type: string

    AppendEvidenceRequest:
      type: object
      required: [evidence]
      properties:
        evidence:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/EvidenceItem"

    PolicyMatch:
      type: object
      properties:
        policy_id: { type: string }
        policy_version: { type: integer }
        rule_id: { type: string }
        explanation: { type: string }

    Decision:
      type: object
      required: [disposition, risk_level]
      properties:
        disposition:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DecisionDisposition"
        risk_level:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/RiskLevel"
        matched_policies:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyMatch"
        requires_approval:
          type: boolean
        approval_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        execution_grant_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        denial_reason:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    IntentEnvelope:
      type: object
      required: [intent_id, status, workspace_id, agent, action, decision, created_at, updated_at]
      properties:
        intent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentStatus"
        agent:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActorRef"
        action:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionIntent"
        context:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentContext"
        decision:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Decision"
        evidence:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/EvidenceItem"
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    IntentListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentEnvelope"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    ApprovalActor:
      type: object
      required: [principal_id]
      properties:
        principal_id:
          type: string
        display_name:
          type: string
        role:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [pending, approved, denied, delegated]

    Approval:
      type: object
      required: [approval_id, intent_id, status, requested_at, approvers]
      properties:
        approval_id:
          type: string
        intent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalStatus"
        rationale:
          type: string
        approvers:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalActor"
        expires_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        requested_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        resolved_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        editable_bounds:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    ApprovalListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Approval"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    ApproveRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        comment:
          type: string
        approve_once:
          type: boolean
          default: false
        step_up_auth_assertion:
          type: string

    DenyRequest:
      type: object
      required: [reason]
      properties:
        reason:
          type: string
        comment:
          type: string

    ModifyApprovalRequest:
      type: object
      required: [modifications]
      properties:
        comment:
          type: string
        modifications:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    ApprovalActionResponse:
      type: object
      required: [approval_id, status]
      properties:
        approval_id:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalStatus"
        intent_status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentStatus"
        execution_grant_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    PolicyCondition:

info:
  title: Agentic Control Plane API
  version: 0.2.0
  summary: Policy, approval, execution, and audit APIs for governed agent actions
  description: |
    v0.2 extends the base control-plane lifecycle with richer, domain-specific schemas for:
      - Git and pull request actions
      - Deploy and cloud actions
      - Email and calendar actions
      - Payment and procurement actions

    Core lifecycle:
      intent -> policy decision -> approval (optional) -> execution grant -> execution -> trace

servers:
  - url: https://app.withaileron.ai
    description: Production

security:
  - bearerAuth: []

tags:
  - name: Intents
  - name: Approvals
  - name: Policies
  - name: Connectors
  - name: Executions
  - name: Funding Sources
  - name: Credentials
  - name: Traces
  - name: Analytics
  - name: Health

                    environment: "production"

                    source_platform: "openclaw"

components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
      bearerFormat: JWT

  parameters:
    IntentId:
      name: intent_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ApprovalId:
      name: approval_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    PolicyId:
      name: policy_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ConnectorId:
      name: connector_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    GrantId:
      name: grant_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ExecutionId:
      name: execution_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    PageSize:
      name: page_size
      in: query
      schema:
        type: integer
        minimum: 1
        maximum: 200
        default: 50
    PageToken:
      name: page_token
      in: query
      schema:
        type: string

  responses:
    BadRequest:
      description: Invalid request
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    Unauthorized:
      description: Missing or invalid authentication
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    Forbidden:
      description: Insufficient permissions
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    NotFound:
      description: Resource not found
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    Conflict:
      description: Conflict with current resource state
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"

  schemas:
    HealthResponse:
      type: object
      required: [status, service, version, timestamp]
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [ok, degraded, down]
        service:
          type: string
        version:
          type: string
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Error:
      type: object
      required: [error]
      properties:
        error:
          type: object
          required: [code, message]
          properties:
            code: { type: string }
            message: { type: string }
            details:
              type: array
              items:
                type: object
                additionalProperties: true
            request_id: { type: string }

    Pagination:
      type: object
      properties:
        next_page_token:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    IntentStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [pending_policy, pending_approval, approved, denied, executing, succeeded, failed, cancelled, expired]

    ApprovalStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [pending, approved, denied, modified, delegated, expired, cancelled]

    PolicyStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [draft, active, archived]

    ConnectorType:
      type: string
      enum: [payments, source_control, cloud, deployment, email, calendar, ticketing, crm, erp, secret_manager, internal_api, custom]

    RiskLevel:
      type: string
      enum: [low, medium, high, critical]

    DecisionDisposition:
      type: string
      enum: [allow, allow_modified, require_approval, deny, require_more_evidence]

    ActorRef:
      type: object
      required: [id, type]
      properties:
        id: { type: string }
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [agent, human, service, connector_runtime]
        display_name: { type: string }

    ActionTarget:
      type: object
      required: [kind]
      properties:
        kind:
          type: string
          enum: [vendor, repository, environment, api, secret, calendar, email_recipient, ticket, cloud_resource, custom]
        id: { type: string }
        display_name: { type: string }

    Money:
      type: object
      required: [amount, currency]
      properties:
        amount:
          type: integer
          description: Amount in minor units
          minimum: 0
        currency:
          type: string
          minLength: 3
          maxLength: 3

    Recipient:
      type: object
      required: [email]
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email

    AttachmentRef:
      type: object
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        mime_type: { type: string }
        url: { type: string, format: uri }
        storage_ref: { type: string }

    CalendarAttendee:
      type: object
      required: [email]
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        optional:
          type: boolean
          default: false

    LineItem:
      type: object
      required: [description, quantity, unit_amount]
      properties:
        description:
          type: string
        quantity:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1
        unit_amount:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        sku:
          type: string

    GitAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [github, gitlab, bitbucket, custom]
        repository:
          type: string
        branch:
          type: string
        base_branch:
          type: string
        commit_shas:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        files_changed:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        pr_title:
          type: string
        pr_body:
          type: string
        labels:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        reviewers:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        checks_required:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string

    DeployAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [kubernetes, vercel, netlify, aws, gcp, azure, flyio, custom]
        service:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        artifact_ref:
          type: string
        image_ref:
          type: string
        cluster:
          type: string
        namespace:
          type: string
        strategy:
          type: string
          enum: [rolling, blue_green, canary, replace, custom]
        rollback_supported:
          type: boolean
        change_ticket_id:
          type: string
        maintenance_window_id:
          type: string

    CloudAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [aws, gcp, azure, cloudflare, custom]
        account_id:
          type: string
        region:
          type: string
        resource_type:
          type: string
        resource_id:
          type: string
        operation:
          type: string
        estimated_cost:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        tags:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: string

    EmailAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        from:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        to:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        cc:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        bcc:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        subject:
          type: string
        body_text:
          type: string
        body_html:
          type: string
        attachments:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/AttachmentRef"
        thread_ref:
          type: string
        send_mode:
          type: string
          enum: [send_now, draft_only]

    CalendarAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [google_calendar, outlook, custom]
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        attendees:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/CalendarAttendee"
        start_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        end_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        timezone:
          type: string
        location:
          type: string
        conference_type:
          type: string
          enum: [none, google_meet, zoom, teams, custom]
        calendar_id:
          type: string
        visibility:
          type: string
          enum: [default, public, private]

    PaymentBeneficiary:
      type: object
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        department: { type: string }

    PaymentAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        vendor_name:
          type: string
        vendor_id:
          type: string
        amount:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        merchant_category:
          type: string
        budget_code:
          type: string
        funding_source_id:
          type: string
        payment_instrument_preference:
          type: string
          enum: [virtual_card, ach, wallet, network_proxy, unspecified]
        beneficiary:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PaymentBeneficiary"
        line_items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/LineItem"
        renewal:
          type: boolean
        contract_term:
          type: string
        recurring_interval:
          type: string
          enum: [none, monthly, quarterly, annual]
        merchant_reference:
          type: string

    ProcurementAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        request_type:
          type: string
          enum: [software, travel, equipment, contractor, services, other]
        vendor_name:
          type: string
        amount_estimate:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        justification:
          type: string
        requestor:
          type: string
        cost_center:
          type: string
        legal_review_required:
          type: boolean
        security_review_required:
          type: boolean
        line_items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/LineItem"

    DomainAction:
      type: object
      description: |
        Carries action-type-specific fields. Exactly one field must be populated,
        corresponding to the prefix of ActionIntent.type:
          - git.* → git
          - deploy.* → deploy
          - cloud.* → cloud
          - email.* → email
          - calendar.* → calendar
          - payment.* → payment
          - procurement.* → procurement
        The server rejects requests where the populated domain field does not
        match the action type prefix.
      minProperties: 1
      maxProperties: 1
      properties:
        git:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/GitAction"
        deploy:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DeployAction"
        cloud:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/CloudAction"
        email:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/EmailAction"
        calendar:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/CalendarAction"
        payment:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PaymentAction"
        procurement:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProcurementAction"

    ActionIntent:
      type: object
      required: [type, summary]
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          examples:
            - git.pull_request.create
            - deploy.release
            - cloud.resource.mutate
            - email.send
            - calendar.event.create
            - payment.charge
            - procurement.request.submit
        summary:
          type: string
        justification:
          type: string
        target:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionTarget"
        domain:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DomainAction"
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    IntentContext:
      type: object
      properties:
        environment:
          type: string
          examples: [development, staging, production]
        source_platform:
          type: string
          examples: [openclaw, claude_code, codex, openhands, goose, cline, continue, langgraph, custom]
        source_session_id:
          type: string
        source_trace_id:
          type: string
        ip_address:
          type: string
        risk_hints:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        user_present:
          type: boolean
        temporary_grant_id:
          type: string

    CreateIntentRequest:
      type: object
      required: [idempotency_key, agent_id, workspace_id, action]
      properties:
        idempotency_key:
          type: string
        agent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        action:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionIntent"
        context:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentContext"
        callback_url:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: |
            Optional webhook URL. The control plane will POST status updates
            to this URL as the intent progresses through the lifecycle
            (policy evaluated, approval requested, approved/denied, execution
            started, execution completed). This avoids the need for agents
            to poll the GET /v1/intents/{id} endpoint.

    EvidenceItem:
      type: object
      required: [type, value]
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [text, link, diff_summary, screenshot_ref, receipt_ref, test_result, change_ticket, artifact_ref, custom]
        label:
          type: string
        value:
          type: string

    AppendEvidenceRequest:
      type: object
      required: [evidence]
      properties:
        evidence:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/EvidenceItem"

    PolicyMatch:
      type: object
      properties:
        policy_id: { type: string }
        policy_version: { type: integer }
        rule_id: { type: string }
        explanation: { type: string }

    Decision:
      type: object
      required: [disposition, risk_level]
      properties:
        disposition:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DecisionDisposition"
        risk_level:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/RiskLevel"
        matched_policies:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyMatch"
        requires_approval:
          type: boolean
        approval_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        execution_grant_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        denial_reason:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    IntentEnvelope:
      type: object
      required: [intent_id, status, workspace_id, agent, action, decision, created_at, updated_at]
      properties:
        intent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentStatus"
        agent:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActorRef"
        action:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionIntent"
        context:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentContext"
        decision:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Decision"
        evidence:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/EvidenceItem"
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    IntentListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentEnvelope"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    ApprovalActor:
      type: object
      required: [principal_id]
      properties:
        principal_id:
          type: string
        display_name:
          type: string
        role:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [pending, approved, denied, delegated]

    Approval:
      type: object
      required: [approval_id, intent_id, status, requested_at, approvers]
      properties:
        approval_id:
          type: string
        intent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalStatus"
        rationale:
          type: string
        approvers:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalActor"
        expires_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        requested_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        resolved_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        editable_bounds:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    ApprovalListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Approval"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    ApproveRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        comment:
          type: string
        approve_once:
          type: boolean
          default: false
        step_up_auth_assertion:
          type: string

    DenyRequest:
      type: object
      required: [reason]
      properties:
        reason:
          type: string
        comment:
          type: string

    ModifyApprovalRequest:
      type: object
      required: [modifications]
      properties:
        comment:
          type: string
        modifications:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    ApprovalActionResponse:
      type: object
      required: [approval_id, status]
      properties:
        approval_id:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalStatus"
        intent_status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentStatus"
        execution_grant_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    PolicyCondition:
      type: object
      properties:
        field:
          type: string
        operator:
          type: string
          enum: [eq, neq, in, not_in, gt, gte, lt, lte, contains, matches]
        value:
          oneOf:
            - type: string
            - type: number
            - type: integer
            - type: boolean
            - type: array
              items: {}

    ApprovalRequirement:
      type: object
      properties:
        mode:
          type: string
          enum: [single, any_of_group, all_of_group, quorum]
        approver_group_id:
          type: string
        quorum_count:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1

    PolicyRule:
      type: object
      required: [rule_id, effect]
      properties:
        rule_id:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        conditions:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyCondition"
        effect:
          type: string
          enum: [allow, deny, require_approval, allow_with_modification]
        approval_requirement:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalRequirement"
        modifications_template:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        priority:
          type: integer
          default: 100

    Policy:
      type: object
      required: [policy_id, name, workspace_id, status, version, rules]
      properties:
        policy_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyStatus"
        version:
          type: integer
        rules:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyRule"
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    CreatePolicyRequest:
      type: object
      required: [workspace_id, name, rules]
      properties:
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyStatus"
        rules:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyRule"

    UpdatePolicyRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyStatus"
        rules:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyRule"

    PolicyListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Policy"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    PolicySimulationRequest:
      type: object
      required: [workspace_id, action]
      properties:
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        action:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionIntent"
        context:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentContext"

    PolicySimulationResponse:
      type: object
      required: [decision]
      properties:
        decision:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Decision"

    ConnectorAuth:
      type: object
      required: [method]
      properties:
        method:
          type: string
          enum: [oauth2, api_key_ref, service_account_ref, webhook_secret_ref, custom]
        reference_id:
          type: string
        scopes:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string

    Connector:
      type: object
      required: [connector_id, workspace_id, type, name, status]
      properties:
        connector_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorType"
        name:
          type: string
        provider:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, disabled, error]
        environment:
          type: string
        auth:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorAuth"
        policy_ids:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    CreateConnectorRequest:
      type: object
      required: [workspace_id, type, name, auth]
      properties:
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorType"
        name:
          type: string
        provider:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        auth:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorAuth"
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    UpdateConnectorRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, disabled]
        auth:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorAuth"
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    ConnectorListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Connector"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    ExecutionGrant:
      type: object
      required: [grant_id, intent_id, status, expires_at]
      properties:
        grant_id:
          type: string
        intent_id:
          type: string
        connector_id:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, consumed, revoked, expired]
        bounded_parameters:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        expires_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    ExecutionRunRequest:
      type: object
      required: [grant_id]
      properties:
        grant_id:
          type: string
        override_parameters:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    ExecutionRunResponse:
      type: object
      required: [execution_id, status]
      properties:
        execution_id:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [accepted, running]
        accepted_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Execution:
      type: object
      required: [execution_id, intent_id, status, started_at]
      properties:
        execution_id:
          type: string
        intent_id:
          type: string
        connector_id:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [accepted, running, succeeded, failed, cancelled]
        output:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        receipt_ref:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        started_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        finished_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true

    ExecutionCallbackRequest:
      type: object
      required: [status]
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [running, succeeded, failed, cancelled]
        output:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        receipt_ref:
          type: string
        error_message:
          type: string

    FundingSource:
      type: object
      required: [funding_source_id, workspace_id, type, name, status]
      properties:
        funding_source_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [virtual_card_pool, budget, fiat_account_ref, lightning_wallet_ref, btc_wallet_ref, stored_balance]
        name:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, disabled]
        currency:
          type: string
        spending_controls:
          type: object
          properties:
            max_single_transaction:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
            allowed_merchants:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            allowed_categories:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    CreateFundingSourceRequest:
      type: object
      required: [workspace_id, type, name]
      properties:
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [virtual_card_pool, budget, fiat_account_ref, lightning_wallet_ref, btc_wallet_ref, stored_balance]
        name:
          type: string
        currency:
          type: string
        spending_controls:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    FundingSourceListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/FundingSource"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    CredentialReference:
      type: object
      required: [credential_id, workspace_id, type, name, vault_path]
      properties:
        credential_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [api_key, oauth_refresh_token, service_account, webhook_secret, custom]
        name:
          type: string
        vault_path:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    CreateCredentialRequest:
      type: object
      required: [workspace_id, type, name, vault_path]
      properties:
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [api_key, oauth_refresh_token, service_account, webhook_secret, custom]
        name:
          type: string
        vault_path:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    CredentialListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/CredentialReference"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    TraceEvent:
      type: object
      required: [event_id, event_type, actor, timestamp]
      properties:
        event_id:
          type: string
        event_type:
          type: string
        actor:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActorRef"
        payload:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Trace:
      type: object
      required: [trace_id, intent_id, events]
      properties:
        trace_id:
          type: string
        intent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        events:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/TraceEvent"

    TraceListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Trace"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    AnalyticsSummary:
      type: object
      properties:
        totals:
          type: object
          properties:
            intents: { type: integer }
            approvals_requested: { type: integer }
            approvals_granted: { type: integer }
            denials: { type: integer }
            executions_succeeded: { type: integer }
            executions_failed: { type: integer }
        spend:
          type: object
          properties:
            total_minor_units: { type: integer }
            currency: { type: string }
        approval_latency_ms:
          type: object
          properties:
            p50: { type: integer }
            p95: { type: integer }
        by_risk_level:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: integer
